title: Allow parameter in generate blocks for SystemVerilog
body:
SystemVerilog allows to use the `parameter` keyword in a generate
block. If used in a generate block it behaves like a `localparam` and
cannot be overridden.

This is described in section 27.2 ("Generate constructs - Overview") of the
LRM (1800-2017).

To be able to generate better error messages when trying to override such
a parameter track whether the parameter is overridable rather than converting
it to localparam.

Also keep parameters and localparams in the same list during parsing to
reduce some duplicated code.
